# What is this for?
it's a required library mod, made specifically for _"Lummy's: Mods" Serie_ in which adds functions and procedures used by the mods I mentioned above. in a way that it makes some functions or procedure calls Smoother & some more procedures used by getting called to do a certain action(s)
Mainly just used for Lummy's: Mods Serie Which has 3 OnDev mods and more coming in the future.
